text: "Hey, how are you doing?" "It's Adriana calling from Wellness Direct. Thanks for picking up." "Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day." "No finger prick." "To see if you qualify for this, do you have Medicare Part A and B?" "Yes." "Okay, I'm going to connect you with a specialist right now. Hold tight for just a second, please." "The number you have dialed is not in service. Please check the number and try again. Goodbye."
